source.commitSubject: fix(ai): preserve ambient AWS auth for Bedrock

fork.revisionRule: With no local patches, the first Beyond fork revision is the preserved upstream commit object present in the full-history Beyond-controlled fork. Future patches require a Beyond fork commit and an updated series.

runtimeSelected.name: @earendil-works/pi-agent-core
runtimeSelected.purpose: agent loop, lifecycle events, state, cancellation, and harness primitives

runtimeSelected.name: @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent
runtimeSelected.purpose: selected headless tools, skill loading, compaction, and session utilities only

compileOnly.name: @earendil-works/pi-tui
compileOnly.reason: The upstream coding-agent build references TUI declarations. It is not an approved Beyond runtime import or production UI.

excluded.name: @earendil-works/pi-orchestrator
excluded.reason: Beyond owns orchestration, tenancy, permissions, durability, and delegation contracts.

excluded.name: @earendil-works/pi-tui
excluded.reason: Beyond has a browser UI; the package remains compile-only until upstream exposes a fully headless coding-agent entry point.
